<!--
感谢你为 ArchAIHarness 贡献代码!
Thanks for contributing to ArchAIHarness!

请确保已阅读贡献指南,并在提交前完成以下检查项。
Please ensure you've read the contributing guidelines and complete the checklist below.
-->

## 📝 变更说明 · Description

<!-- 简明描述这个 PR 做了什么、为什么这么做 -->
<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why -->

## 🔗 关联 Issue · Related Issue

<!-- 使用 Closes/Fixes/Refs 关联 Issue,合并时自动关闭 -->
<!-- Use Closes/Fixes/Refs to link issues; they'll auto-close on merge -->

- Closes #

## 🧭 变更类型 · Type of Change

<!-- 勾选所有适用项 · Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐞 Bug 修复 · Bug fix(不破坏现有功能 · non-breaking)
- [ ] 🚀 新功能 · New feature(不破坏现有功能 · non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 破坏性变更 · Breaking change(影响现有行为 · affects existing behavior)
- [ ] ♻️ 重构 · Refactor(无功能变化 · no functional change)
- [ ] 📖 文档 · Documentation
- [ ] 🧪 测试 · Tests
- [ ] 🔧 构建/CI · Build / CI
- [ ] 🎨 代码风格 · Style / Formatting

## 🧩 影响范围 · Scope

<!-- 涉及哪些仓库或模块 · Which repos/modules are affected -->

- 仓库 · Repository:
- 模块 · Module(s):

## 🧪 验证方式 · How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- 描述如何验证你的改动,包括测试命令、测试场景 -->
<!-- Describe how you verified the changes -->

- [ ] 单元测试 · Unit tests
- [ ] 集成测试 · Integration tests
- [ ] 手动验证 · Manual verification
- [ ] 其他 · Other:

**测试命令 · Test command(s):**

```bash

```

## 📸 截图 / 日志 · Screenshots / Logs

<!-- 如适用,提供截图、日志、性能对比数据 -->
<!-- If applicable, attach screenshots, logs, or benchmark data -->

## ✅ 检查清单 · Checklist

<!-- 提交 PR 前请逐项确认 · Please confirm before submitting -->

- [ ] 我已阅读项目的[贡献指南](https://github.com/ArchAIHarness/docs)与设计哲学 · I've read the contributing guidelines and design philosophy
- [ ] 代码遵循项目规范(命名、分层、注释、Javadoc) · Code follows project conventions
- [ ] 已添加必要的测试,且本地全部通过 · Added necessary tests and they pass locally
- [ ] 已更新相关文档 · Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] 提交信息清晰、符合规范(Conventional Commits 风格) · Commit messages are clear and follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] 不包含未使用的代码、调试日志、密钥 · No dead code, debug logs, or secrets
- [ ] 已自我审查,确认改动符合预期 · Self-reviewed the changes

## 🧠 设计说明 · Design Notes(可选 · optional)

<!-- 如果是较大改动,简述设计取舍、替代方案、潜在影响 -->
<!-- For non-trivial changes, explain design decisions, alternatives, and impact -->

> Engineered by Architects · Empowered by AI
